articles.title: New York State halts construction of all new data centers
articles.description: New York has become the first state to temporarily halt approval of large data centers, as Gov. Kathy Hochul argues the AI-driven building boom shouldn’t come at the expense of higher electricity costs, water supplies, or local control.

articles.title: Iran abused mobile networks’ vulnerabilities to locate U.S. military in the Middle East, report says
articles.description: The Iranian government exploited well-known flaws in cellphone networks to locate and then strike U.S. military personnel in the build-up and beginning of the war.

articles.title: I’m de-influencing you from buying the RingConn 3 (even though it’s pretty)
articles.description: The RingConn 3 actually looks like real jewelry, not a wearable -- but its fitness tracking and headache detection features are disappointing.

articles.title: Reflection inks $1B compute deal with Nebius
articles.description: Reflection AI has signed a $1 billion deal to access Nebius' compute. Reflection was founded in 2024 and is developing open source AI technology.

articles.title: The real AI race may no longer be at the frontier
articles.description: Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue says enterprises increasingly want open models, due to cost, accessibility, and ownership. Do frontier models still matter if most production AI ends up running on open models?

articles.title: Telegram’s shortlink domain is back online after day-long suspension
articles.description: Telegram CEO Pavel Durov confirmed an outage in a tweet, saying that shortlinks to the messaging app had "stopped working."

articles.title: Spotify expands its AI push with a ChatGPT-like music assistant
articles.description: Spotify is rolling out a new AI-powered conversational feature that lets Premium subscribers chat with the app to discover music, podcasts, audiobooks, and more.

articles.title: Superhuman’s new auto-draft feature almost makes me like AI replies
articles.description: Superhuman’s latest AI email drafting feature is its most convincing yet, generating replies that often required little to no editing in our testing.

articles.title: David Beckham’s health drink startup IM8 takes $1B from General Catalyst’s unusual CVF fund
articles.description: General Catalyst’s Customer Value Fund doesn't make equity investments. It's providing $1 billion for IM8, known for its longevity vitamin drink.

articles.title: Pinwheel launches a retro-inspired landline phone for kids
articles.description: Kid-friendly tech company Pinwheel announced the launch of a new landline phone designed to let children stay connected without the distractions of a smartphone.

articles.title: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
articles.description: They're rolling up their sleeves again, seemingly out of fear of missing AI's defining moment and, presumably, the irresistible allure of making even more money -- potentially a lot more.

articles.title: Uber’s product chief on hotels, robotaxis, and why the company doesn’t want to be ‘everything for everyone’
articles.description: Uber Chief Product Officer Sachin Kansal walks TechCrunch through the company's financial services ambitions, its increasingly complicated relationship with Waymo, its new AV Labs data operation, and how AI is starting to show up in ways riders and drivers will actually notice.

articles.title: Video-generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
articles.description: With the cash, the company aims to expand its world model offering and reach customers across geographies.

articles.title: X just tweaked its algorithm to make it more friendly, less battleground
articles.description: The social media site says it will amplify posts made by users' mutual followers' to give the feed more of a communal feel.

articles.title: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
articles.description: The company is raising at least $75 million, led by Robot Ventures, with significant participation from USV and other prominent investors.

articles.title: Satya Nadella has issued a shocking warning to companies using AI
articles.description: Of all the debates raging about the potential downsides of AI, there is one worry causing the most hand-wringing among AI enthusiasts in Silicon Valley — that the giant AI labs that sell proprietary models are somehow acting like Trojan horses.

articles.title: Apple says former employee exploited ‘rare’ bug to download confidential files after leaving for OpenAI
articles.description: Apple would not comment on the "security breach," which allegedly allowed a former employee to download sensitive files from Apple's network long after he departed the company for rival OpenAI.

articles.title: The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
articles.description: Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI contains allegations that range from employees joking about unauthorized access to Apple’s systems to claims that job candidates were asked to bring Apple hardware to interviews. Here are the complaint’s most eye-catching claims.

articles.title: Sam Altman’s space data center trash talk is what most experts already believe
articles.description: Responding to Musk accusing him of being a scammer, Altman said, "homeboy you're the one sellling [sic] public market investors on short-term space datacenters."

articles.title: Investors send General Fusion soaring in debut as first publicly traded fusion company
articles.description: General Fusion started trading on the Nasdaq following a reverse merger that saw high redemptions.

articles.title: Taco Bell eyed in explosive diarrheal outbreak; leafy greens suspected
articles.description: Health officials have not confirmed a source yet—and there may be multiple sources.

articles.title: Boomers, not Gen Z, are the generation cutting back most on alcohol
articles.description: New research overturns assumption that abstinent younger drinkers are behind weak demand.

articles.title: SpaceX is gearing up for Starship's 13th test flight later this week
articles.description: This flight will put Starship under higher pressure and test out new Starlink satellites in orbit.

articles.title: US continues to shun Ebola-infected citizens; second American sent to Germany
articles.description: The man is said to be doing well in a Frankfurt hospital.

articles.title: The US government warns that Russia state hackers are coming after your router
articles.description: With residential proxies all the rage, CISA urges router users to be vigilant.

articles.title: Ukrainian drone strikes forced Russia to stop shipping in vital sea corridor
articles.description: Ukraine’s drone blitz halted Russia’s Sea of Azov shipping in under a week.

articles.title: California creates $3,500 rebate for new electric vehicle buyers
articles.description: There's a separate $1,750 rebate for used EVs, but both rebates have a price cap.

articles.title: Apple sues OpenAI after ex-engineer allegedly used bug to steal trade secrets
articles.description: OpenAI accused of conspiring with former Apple employees to steal trade secrets.

articles.title: Solution to Feynman's reverse sprinkler puzzle also applies to "silly sprinklers"
articles.description: New study confirms 2024 "momentum flux theory" on how angular momentum of water flows drives rotation.

articles.description: "If we can't control the force of nature, at least we can control the narrative."

articles.title: Apple and Samsung benefit as memory shortage pushes smartphone shipments to historic lows
articles.description: The biggest smartphone makers keep on trucking in the face of component shortages and economic uncertainty.

articles.title: Colorado will decide whether a "right to natural gas" is added to state constitution
articles.description: The amendment would restrict building codes that promote electrification.

articles.title: Hackers quickly prove that Neo Geo Doom ports are not "impossible"
articles.description: Clever coding and graphical compromises get a classic game on more classic hardware.

articles.title: A "disaster waiting to happen"? Industry officials worry about Crew Dragon availability.

articles.title: Now, defenders are embracing the prompt injection, too
articles.description: "Context bombing" tricks hacking agents into shutting down before they can do harm.

articles.title: Simulating everything, sort of: The promise and limits of world models
articles.description: Experts explain how they work, what they can do, and what's still unsettled.

articles.title: The real mystery behind Moana: After 1,700 years, why did Polynesians suddenly sail east?
articles.description: New climate evidence adds context to these long voyages.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **纽约州暂停所有新建数据中心**：因能源与环境考量，纽约州政府叫停新建数据中心项目，可能影响科技行业的基础设施扩张。
2. **伊朗利用移动网络漏洞定位美军**：报告指出伊朗通过手机网络漏洞追踪中东地区美军位置，凸显网络安全与地缘风险。
3. **AI与通信领域新动向**：Telegram短链接域名恢复；Spotify推出类ChatGPT音乐助手；Superhuman邮件自动起草功能获好评；X平台调整算法减少冲突。
4. **大额投资与估值飙升**：Reflection与Nebius签署10亿美元计算协议；视频生成公司PixVerse融资4.39亿美元，估值超20亿；Nous Research融资估值达15亿美元。
5. **科技行业“二次创业”现象**：报道指出，已有财富与成功的科技赢家再度投入高强度工作，反映行业竞争与创新压力持续加剧。

**今日最值得关注的发展：** AI应用加速渗透日常服务（如Spotify、邮件助手），同时地缘政治与能源限制正深刻影响科技基础设施布局。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **PyTorch性能优化新方向**：Hugging Face发布PyTorch性能分析（第三部分），强调注意力机制的优化是核心，同时推出vLLM原生速度的transformers建模后端，显著提升推理效率。
2. **AI代理与数据工作流整合**：Hugging Face推出“Data for Agents”方案，并实现从Hugging Face到Amazon SageMaker Studio的一键部署，降低AI应用开发门槛。
3. **ChatGPT企业级应用深化**：OpenAI博客聚焦销售与数据科学团队使用ChatGPT Work的实践，并宣布GPT-5.6成为Microsoft 365 Copilot首选模型，强调其前沿智能与规模适配能力。
4. **AI安全与教育拓展**：OpenAI启动GPT-5.5生物漏洞赏金计划，同时推出K-12教师AI技能培训，并明确政府与国家安全合作策略。
5. **开发者工具与评估优化**：OpenAI提出在代码评估中“区分信号与噪声”的方法，提升AI开发效率与可靠性。

今日最值得关注的是：**GPT-5.6正式成为Microsoft 365 Copilot首选模型**，标志着前沿AI能力在办公场景中的规模化落地，同时Hugging Face的vLLM后端和PyTorch性能优化为开发者提供了更高效的推理基础设施。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **中美科技竞争与芯片领域新动向**：中美AI竞赛出现意外转折，荷兰光刻机巨头ASML面临产能与中国市场挑战；中国在极紫外光刻（EUV）技术研发上接近突破，被视为“北京版曼哈顿计划”。
2. **中国科技与工业自主进展**：中国机器人梦想始于1972年，当前在沙漠中建造全尺寸美军舰模型；比亚迪超越特斯拉成为全球电动车领跑者，但国内市场面临“生死存亡”危机。
3. **国际资源与技术博弈**：印度初创公司试图用软件打破中国稀土垄断；俄罗斯与中国在“无限制”伙伴关系下合作，涉及星链卫星打击等议题。
4. **社会与经济挑战**：中国高校毕业生过剩，就业市场难以吸纳；中国社会正应对自身“男性圈层”问题；法国失去鹅肝冠军地位，中国成为新晋鹅肝生产大国。
5. **法律与舆论争议**：美国最高法院裁定思科在建设中国“金盾”项目中享有豁免权；有视频呼吁停止“但中国也这样”的借口式辩护；华尔街日报称中国AI已匹敌Anthropic被指明显不实。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：中国在极紫外光刻技术上的突破性进展，以及比亚迪在全球电动车竞赛中超越特斯拉，共同标志着中国在高端制造与核心技术领域加速突围，但同时也面临内外部多重挑战。
